PreToolUse.if: Bash(gh issue comment *)|Bash(gh pr comment *)|Bash(gh issue edit *)|Bash(gh issue close *)|Bash(gh issue reopen *)|Bash(gh issue label *)|Bash(gh issue create *)|Bash(gh pr edit *)|Bash(gh pr close *)|Bash(gh pr reopen *)|Bash(gh pr label *)

hooks.command: echo '{"decision": "ask", "message": "You are about to post a PUBLIC comment on GitHub. Did Jonathan explicitly ask you to post this?"}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | { read file; if [[ "$file" == *.md ]] && [[ "$file" != *CLAUDE.md ]] && [[ "$file" != *.claude/* ]]; then echo '{"block": true, "feedback": "Blocked: Do not create/edit markdown files outside .claude/ directory. Exception: CLAUDE.md files are allowed."}'; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\./gradlew' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q '\-\-no-scan'; then echo '{"block": true, "feedback": "Blocked: All Gradle commands must include --no-scan flag."}'; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(git reset --hard|git clean -fd|git filter-branch)'; then echo '{"decision": "ask", "message": "Destructive git operation detected. Confirm before proceeding."}'; fi; }
echo 'Reminder: Use --no-scan with all Gradle commands. NEVER use gh issue/pr comment on the PUBLIC issue tracker without explicit permission. NEVER commit to main directly.'
